shopify.title: Shopify
shopify.subtitle: Connect your Shopify store to sync orders automatically.

connectForm.title: Connect your Shopify store
connectForm.subtitle: Paste your store URL and a private admin access token. Hesabaty only reads orders.
connectForm.tokenHint: Starts with shpat_ (we never display this back to you)

howTo.summary: How do I get an access token?
howTo.step1: In Shopify Admin, go to Settings → Apps and sales channels → Develop apps.
howTo.step2: Create a private app called "Hesabaty Business".
howTo.step3: Under Configuration → Admin API, grant the "read_orders" scope.
howTo.step4: Install the app, then copy the Admin API access token here.

hero.headline: Track every pound. Grow with clarity.
hero.subheadline: The simplest way to track revenue, expenses, and profit for your small business — built specifically for Egyptian e-commerce.

problem.headline: Stop guessing whether your business is profitable.
problem.body: No more scattered notebooks, missing receipts, or end-of-month surprises. Hesabaty Business gives you a clear picture of your money — in real time.

comparison.headline: Stop overpaying your accountant.
comparison.body: Get the same clarity for a quarter of the cost. And see your numbers in real time, not next month.
comparison.hesabatyPro1: Updates the second you log a sale
comparison.hesabatyPro2: Lives in your pocket — no meetings

features.headline: Built for how you actually run a business.
features.liveProfitBody: Every sale logged. Every receipt counted. The number you actually care about, always up to date.

howItWorks.headline: Three taps. Real clarity.
howItWorks.body: No accountant. No spreadsheets. No "I'll do it later".
howItWorks.step1Body: Three fields. Done in 10 seconds. Categorized automatically.
howItWorks.step2Body: Every transaction. One feed. Sorted by time, color-coded by type.
howItWorks.step3Body: Live P&L. Month-over-month. Top expenses. All automatic.

privacy.badge: A privacy promise, not a policy
privacy.headline: We can't see your numbers. And we never will.
privacy.body: Every business runs in its own isolated vault. Encrypted at rest. Encrypted in transit. Never analyzed, never sold, never trained on.
privacy.neverDo1Body: Your financial data is encrypted with keys we can't access.
privacy.neverDo2Body: No advertisers. No data brokers. No "partners".
privacy.do1Body: Row-level security at the database. Other users physically can't see your data.
privacy.do2Body: TLS 1.3 in transit. AES-256 at rest. Industry-standard, no compromises.
privacy.do3Body: One tap in settings wipes your account and every byte we hold.

cta.headline: Your business deserves better books.
cta.body: Up to 4× cheaper than a traditional accountant. See your real profit. Stay in control.

footer.tagline: Financial clarity for Egyptian small businesses. Built with care in Cairo.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: Hesabaty Business is built on a simple promise: your financial data is yours alone. We never sell it, never train AI models on it, and only share it with the strict minimum of providers needed to run the service. This page explains exactly how we honor that promise — including how we handle data from Shopify stores you connect.
privacyPage.section1Body: We collect only what's needed to provide the service:
privacyPage.section1Bullet1: Account info: email address and password (or Google/Apple ID).
privacyPage.section1Bullet2: Business profile: business name, industry, sales channels.
privacyPage.section1Bullet3: Financial entries: revenue and expense records you choose to log.
privacyPage.section1Bullet4: Connected Shopify store data: when you link a Shopify store, we read order data (order number, totals, financial and fulfillment status, line items, and the customer's name attached to each order) and the access token Shopify issues us. We never read customer email, phone, address, payment details, or any Shopify resource outside of orders.
privacyPage.section1Bullet5: AI assistant messages: the questions you type into the in-app financial assistant. These are sent to Google's Gemini API to generate a response; under their enterprise terms your data is not used to train AI models.
privacyPage.section2Body: We use your data exclusively to operate Hesabaty Business: storing your manual entries, syncing your Shopify orders, calculating profit and loss, generating reports, sending reminders for unpaid expenses, and answering your questions through the AI assistant. We never use your financial data for advertising, sell it to third parties, or train AI models on it.
privacyPage.section3Body: We rely on a small number of providers to run the service. Each is a data processor acting on our behalf:
privacyPage.section3Bullet1: Supabase, Inc. — database, authentication, and serverless functions for all data described in section 1.
privacyPage.section3Bullet2: Google LLC (Gemini API) — generates AI assistant responses. Only the chat messages you type are sent.
privacyPage.section3Bullet3: Apple Inc. and Google LLC (push services) — deliver push notifications when you enable them. Only your device's push token is shared.
privacyPage.section3Bullet4: Shopify Inc. — source of the order data we sync from your store. We only read; we never send your data back to Shopify.
privacyPage.section4Title: 4. Where it lives & how long we keep it
privacyPage.section4Body: Your data is stored on Supabase infrastructure with row-level security. Each business is logically isolated — no other user can query your records, ever. Data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). Authentication tokens live in your device's secure keychain, never in plain storage. Some processors (Supabase, Google) operate servers outside Egypt, in the European Union and the United States. We retain your data while your account is active. When you disconnect Shopify, we deactivate the integration and revoke our access token immediately. When you delete your account, every byte we hold about you is permanently removed within 24 hours. When Shopify notifies us of a shop data erasure request after a merchant uninstalls, we delete all corresponding order data within 48 hours. When Shopify notifies us of a customer data erasure request, we redact the affected customer's data within 30 days.
privacyPage.section5Body: Under Egypt's Personal Data Protection Law (Law No. 151 of 2020) and, where applicable, the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to:
privacyPage.section5Bullet1: Access the personal data we hold about you.
privacyPage.section5Bullet3: Delete your data — the right to be forgotten.
privacyPage.section5Bullet4: Export your data in a portable format.
privacyPage.section5Bullet6: Withdraw consent at any time and lodge a complaint with Egypt's Data Protection Center or your local supervisory authority.
privacyPage.section6Body: Questions about privacy, or to exercise any of your rights? Email us at <link>abdukhaznety@gmail.com</link>. If you are an end-customer of a merchant who uses Hesabaty Business, you can contact the merchant directly or email us and we will coordinate with the merchant. We respond within 30 days.

termsPage.title: Terms of Use
termsPage.intro: By creating a Hesabaty Business account, you agree to these terms. We've kept them short and human. Read them once — they're shorter than your last grocery receipt.
termsPage.section1Body: By signing up for Hesabaty Business, you confirm you're at least 18 years old, legally able to enter contracts, and you accept these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the service.
termsPage.section2Body: You're responsible for keeping your login credentials safe and for everything that happens under your account. If you suspect unauthorized access, contact us immediately at support@hesabaty.com.
termsPage.section3Body: Use Hesabaty Business for legitimate business bookkeeping. Don't try to reverse-engineer the app, scrape our backend, abuse the AI assistant, share invite codes for resale, or use the service to facilitate illegal activity.
termsPage.section4Body: Hesabaty Business is a bookkeeping tool, not a tax accountant or financial advisor. We provide the service "as is" without warranty of any kind. You're responsible for the accuracy of the data you enter and for your own tax and legal compliance.
termsPage.section5Body: To the fullest extent allowed by law, Hesabaty Business is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service. Our maximum liability for any claim will not exceed the amount you paid us in the previous 12 months.
termsPage.section6Body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Arab Republic of Egypt. Any disputes will be resolved in the courts of Cairo, Egypt.
termsPage.section7Body: We may update these terms occasionally. If we make material changes, we'll notify you in the app at least 30 days before they take effect. Continued use after that means you accept the new terms.

waitlistPage.title: Join the waitlist.
waitlistPage.body: Be among the first 200 Egyptian SMEs to use Hesabaty Business. Free during early access. No card required.
waitlistPage.benefit1Body: Get your invite code as soon as we open access — usually within 7 days.
waitlistPage.benefit2Body: Use everything for free until we launch publicly. No tricks, no card.
waitlistPage.benefit3Body: Real humans answering your questions, not chatbots or ticket queues.
waitlistPage.benefit4Body: Your feedback during beta directly shapes what we build next.
